title: dryopteris wardii
intro: Dryopteris wardii, also known as the Ward's fern, is a species of fern native to China. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood sugar levels and its anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris wardii include its potential to improve insulin sensitivity, reduce oxidative stress, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes and other metabolic disorders. Dryopteris wardii can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in traditional Chinese medicine, and is also sold as a dietary supplement in the form of capsules or tablets.
